prose: The frontier orbital HOMO–LUMO gap of formaldehyde was computed as 5.86967 eV using **DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase. The geometry source was user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz (not re-optimized at DFT). Basis: def2-TZVP; charge = 0, multiplicity = 1. SCF converged (8 cycles), confirming the result is valid. Found HOMO = −7.6523 eV and LUMO = −1.7826 eV, yielding the gap reported.
